ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., L, XL) */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size (e.g., Small, Medium, Large) */,
  "size_group" TEXT /* Category of the size (e.g., Adult, Children, Plus Size) */,
  "bust" INTEGER /* Bust measurement */,
  "hips" INTEGER /* Hips measurement */,
  "sleeve" INTEGER /* Sleeve measurement */,
  "cuff" INTEGER /* Cuff measurement */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garments" (
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment */,
  "garment_name" TEXT /* Name of the garment */,
  "garment_description" TEXT /* Description of the garment */,
  "garment_type" TEXT /* Type of the garment (e.g., shirt, pants) */,
  "garment_season" TEXT /* Season for which the garment is designed (e.g., Spring, Summer, Fall, Winter) */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart for the garment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("garment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_garments_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the garment associated with the size chart */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size within the size chart */,
  "size_chart_name" TEXT /* Name of the size chart (e.g., Adult Size Chart, Children's Size Chart) */,
  "size_chart_revision" INTEGER /* Revision number of the size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_garment_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_id") REFERENCES garments ("garment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, pattern maker, production team, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the size data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the size data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the size data (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart that was modified */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the size chart was modified */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the modification */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_versions_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "bust" INTEGER /* Bust measurement in the historical data */,
  "hips" INTEGER /* Hips measurement in the historical data */,
  "sleeve" INTEGER /* Sleeve measurement in the historical data */,
  "cuff" INTEGER /* Cuff measurement in the historical data */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length measurement in the historical data */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the version of the size chart */,
  "history_description" TEXT /* Description of the historical data entry */,
  "history_reason" TEXT /* Reason for creating the historical data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_history_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_history_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES size_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size that was revised */,
  "previous_value" INTEGER /* Previous value of the size specification */,
  "new_value" INTEGER /* New value of the size specification */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date when the revision was made */,
  "revision_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the revision */,
  "revision_reason" TEXT /* Reason for making the revision */,
  "revision_status" TEXT /* Status of the revision (e.g., approved, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_revisions_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "department_manager" INTEGER /* ID of the department manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "department_users" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the user belongs to */,
  "association_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was associated with the department */,
  "association_status" TEXT /* Status of the association (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_department_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_department_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)
